bird.name: Black honey buzzard
bird.summary: The black honey buzzard (Henicopernis infuscatus), also known as the New Britain honey buzzard, is a large raptor of the family Accipitrida…

relations.subject: Black honey buzzard
relations.evidence: This species is estimated to have lost 12.5% of the primary forest within its range between the years 1990 and 2000. The island of New Britain has experienced considerable deforestation due to logging, as well as land use change as forested areas are converted to small-scale agricultural operations and oil palm plantations
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
